flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Carleton College rose 21% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.8k → $16.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Carleton College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.2k → $68.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Carleton College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.2k → $68.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Carleton College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
